title: CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page » MODEL CARS
user_story:
As a visitor
I want the CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page to show all connected MODEL CARS
So I can ...
description:
* The CAR MODEL VARIANT detail page contains a section with a list of all connected MODEL CARS.
* Each MODEL CAR in the list is presented with its name and primary information.
* Each MODEL CAR in the list contains a link to its detail page.
* Each MODEL CAR in the list has a thumbnail image.
* When there is no MODEL CAR connected to the CAR MODEL VARIANT then the section is not displayed at all.
